task_completion.description: Locate and open the taxpayer's source documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\' or a document viewer displaying the tax slips for Isabella Rossi.
The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen, either at the start wizard or the main interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the taxpayer's basic profile information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Personal Information or T1 General screen in StudioTax showing the name 'Isabella Rossi' and province 'Nova Scotia' (or 'NS').

task_completion.description: Input the relevant tax data and specific credits into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms showing data entry for specific credits: Line 31285 (Home Accessibility), Line 30450 (Canada Caregiver Credit), or Line 46900 (Eligible Educator).

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or File Explorer window showing the file 'isabella_rossi.24t' being saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax title bar displaying this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with StudioTax menus, forms, and wizards, rather than terminal commands generating the .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the tax documents rather than hallucinating the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the contents of the files located in the 'rossi' TaxDocuments folder.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible and navigated to the correct Documents folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer is Isabella Rossi (Province: NS). Relevant 2024 tax lines to verify: Line 31285 (Home Accessibility Tax Credit - do NOT use Schedule 12 for this in 2024), Line 30450 (Canada Caregiver Credit), and Line 46900 (Eligible Educator). Note: The specific document values are unverified, so verify that the agent attempts to fill these specific lines based on the provided documents.
